Back to June launch training. So this won't so that they can sell and do so well without a lot of training. And so I'm very excited to share this with you. A lot of time and effort has gone into simplifying this selling system so that anyone can do it. Like everything that happens from the time they show until the money actually clears the account. So all of that is still selling and then you could even make an argument that you're always selling. You're still like on the phone when you're selling the appointment. You're selling when you're marketing, you're selling when you're fulfilling. You're constantly selling. But just for the purposes of this training, it's going to be how to really manage the conversation so that we can turn prospects who walk through the door into closed sales.
